final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement screenshot for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout optimized for mobile display, brand and product as hero
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as the central hero product
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, visually striking backdrop — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high visual-impact atmosphere with strong brand presence — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, premium surface treatment — exact finish and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro"
Constraints: must preserve 1080×1920 portrait aspect ratio; layout must read as a polished brand-exposure ad screenshot
Avoid:
